author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Upgraded both exp_fast_f64 and exp_fast_f32 docstrings with a prominent '⚠️ Subnormal handling (#401)' section: flush boundary, affected algorithms (log-sum-exp, softmax), recommended subnormal-preserving slow path (f64::exp/f32::exp), and the LSE shifting trick as the practical workaround.

f32 wrapper documents that it inherits the f64 flush and loses subnormal range f32::exp would preserve.

Implementation didn't change - the accuracy/speed trade-off stays intentional. Documentation now makes the trade-off impossible to miss. Commit 64a56712.
